vibe-leaning-forward.name: The Competitive Lean
vibe-leaning-forward.logic: Sudden escalation from casual monitoring to aggressive execution.
vibe-leaning-forward.prompt_injection: Describe a transition from standard market analysis to high-stakes decision making using the 'leaning forward in chair' logic.

vibe-env-escape.name: The Geographic Exit
vibe-env-escape.structure: Absurdity: {Market_Signal} -> Action: 'I am no longer in this market.'
vibe-env-escape.logic: Total rejection of a market condition so ridiculous it forces an exit from reality.
vibe-env-escape.prompt_injection: React to over-leveraged or absurdly priced listings by stating you have exited the environment entirely.

vibe-doorbell-chud.name: The Intrusive Presence
vibe-doorbell-chud.logic: An unwanted or awkward market force suddenly appearing where it doesn't belong.
vibe-doorbell-chud.prompt_injection: Describe intrusive market forces like rate hikes or corporate flippers as an unsettling doorbell-camera presence.

vibe-maxxing.name: Hyper-Optimization
vibe-maxxing.logic: Obsessive focus on one specific attribute to the exclusion of all else.
vibe-maxxing.prompt_injection: Adopt a tone of singular obsession with a specific property metric by appending '-maxxing' to key nouns.
